hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('command','')[:80])" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^(rm -rf|git push --force|git reset --hard|DROP TABLE|truncate)'; then echo "BLOCKED: Destructive command requires explicit user confirmation" >&2; exit 2; fi
